name: RanchIntro
short: Welcomes new members to a public channel when they post their first introduction.
description: Watches a designated introductions channel for a new member's first message, promotes them to an active member role, removes their new member role, and reposts a welcome embed in a public channel crediting the original poster.
install_msg: Thanks for installing RanchIntro! Get started with `[p]ri settings` and `[p]help ranchintro`.
author: nerdbarbie
end_user_data_statement: This cog does not store any end user data. Role changes and welcome posts are performed in real-time.
